Headline: Candlewick Press
Description: Candlewick Press, established in 1992 and located in Somerville, Massachusetts, is part of the Walker Books Group. The logo depicting a bear carrying a candle is based on Walker Books' original logo.

Headline: My Secret Life (Julee Cruise album)
Description: My Secret Life is the fourth and final album by Julee Cruise and was released in 2011. The album was produced by DJ Dmitry of Deee-lite, and was the last album released by Cruise before her death in 2022.[1]

Headline: Anne-Sofie Østvedt
Description: Anne-Sofie Østvedt (later married Strømnæs) (2 January 1920 – 16 November 2009) was one of the leaders of the Norwegian intelligence organisation XU.

Headline: Manganese(II,III) oxide
Description: Manganese(II,III) oxide is the manganese oxide with the chemical compound with formula Mn3O4. Manganese is present in two oxidation states, +2 and +3, and the formula is sometimes written as MnO·Mn2O3. Mn3O4 is found in nature as the mineral hausmannite.

Headline: List of storms named Carlotta
Description: The name Carlotta has been used for twelve tropical cyclones in the Eastern Pacific Ocean and one in the Australian region of the South Pacific.
